reasoning: We need to directly tackle your poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. Your last ride showed a low average power relative to your potential. By focusing on Over-Unders specifically on Emigration Canyon, we simulate the Alpine Loop demands and enhance your fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform intervals alternating between 5 min at 201-218W and 3 min at 242-256W, repeat until duration complete

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
